package rulefixtures

// scenario for buffer_write_rune_ascii_literal: `bytes.Buffer.WriteRune('x')` for ASCII literals instead of `WriteByte`.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule441NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario441Negative(records []Rule441NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
